title: Your First Grocery Run
summary: Build a low-stress first-week food system without overspending.

sections.title: The Moment
sections.value: Day two. You are standing in a supermarket aisle with no reliable price memory and no food plan.

sections.title: The Feeling
sections.value: You are not confused about food. You are overloaded by decisions without context.

sections.title: The Reveal
sections.value: You can eat well in your first week with a tiny repeat list. Brand familiarity is not the same as value.

sections.title: How It Actually Works
sections.value:
Start with 10-12 essentials you can combine into 3 meals. Use unit pricing, not packaging size.

Pick one supermarket for routine shopping and one backup store for low-stock days.

sections.title: The Bridge
sections.value: When you're ready, find supermarkets and markets near you.

sections.title: Next Chapter
sections.value: Next: Getting a Myki and surviving PTV — so you can move without guessing.
